_meta.description: Proposed onboard copy — keys grouped by screen, ourPromise renamed to promiseLabel

onboard.body: Look up businesses. See who they fund. Decide where to spend.
onboard.featureMap: MAP — Flag GOP donors near you
onboard.featureTrack: TRACK — Log the platforms you skipped
onboard.featureScorecard: SCORECARD — See your impact every Friday
onboard.noAccountsDesc: No sign-in, no email, no user ID. Ever.
onboard.noLocationDesc: GPS is session-only. Coordinates never written to disk.
onboard.noHistoryDesc: Only records what you actively avoided — never what you visited.
onboard.onDeviceDesc: All data stays on your phone. No servers, no syncing.
onboard.openSourceDesc: Every line of code is public.
onboard.locWhy: We use your location to center the map on your neighborhood.
onboard.locPromise: GPS is session-only — never stored, never transmitted.
onboard.notifWhy: Your weekly scorecard drops every Friday.
onboard.notifPromise: Notifications are local-only. No server push.

renamed.ourPromise → promiseLabel: Shared label on both permission cards. Renamed to match naming pattern (locTitle, locWhy, locPromise... promiseLabel).

restructured.keys grouped by screen: Keys reordered to match the 3-screen flow: Welcome → Privacy → Permissions → Shared. Comments added as section dividers.

_changes.no_value_changes: All string values are identical to current. This is a structural change only.
